title: A Senior Player Now
prose: Years of trials and reserve matches and early-morning practices have added up to something, by sixth year — you're one of the senior players now, the one newer team members look to for how a warm-up is supposed to go, whether or not the captaincy itself ever came your way.
It's a strange thing, being the person you once watched from the stands. Mostly, it's a good one.

choices.label: The captaincy is yours this year.
Not captain — but a senior player all the same.
